---
title: "Route and Evolution Animations"
format: html
---

Latest animation assets for `local_chunked_run`.

## Download Bundles

- [Full report bundle ZIP](assets/transport/downloads/local_chunked_run_report_bundle.zip)
- [Animations ZIP](assets/transport/downloads/local_chunked_run_animations.zip)

## New Run Animations (local_chunked_run)

### Transport MC Animation

<video controls preload="metadata" width="100%">
  <source src="assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/transport_mc_animation.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

### Transport MC Evolution

<video controls preload="metadata" width="100%">
  <source src="assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/transport_mc_evolution.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

## Route Animations (latest available route-track set)

<video controls preload="metadata" width="100%">
  <source src="assets/transport/downloads/route_animation_diesel.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

<video controls preload="metadata" width="100%">
  <source src="assets/transport/downloads/route_animation_bev.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

<video controls preload="metadata" width="100%">
  <source src="assets/transport/downloads/route_animation_diesel_vs_bev.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

## Representative Scenario Metrics

```{r}
#| echo: false
rows_path <- "assets/transport/local_chunked_run/data/transport_sim_rows.csv"
if (file.exists(rows_path)) {
  df <- utils::read.csv(rows_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  keep <- c(
    "replicate_id", "scenario_name", "powertrain", "origin_name", "destination_name",
    "route_id", "trip_distance_miles", "trip_duration_hours", "congestion_delay_hours",
    "charging_events", "co2_per_1000kcal"
  )
  keep <- keep[keep %in% names(df)]
  show <- df[df$replicate_id == min(df$replicate_id, na.rm = TRUE), keep, drop = FALSE]
  knitr::kable(show)
}
```
